problems.title: Smart Campus Navigation
problems.problem: Students often struggle to navigate large campus areas, find classrooms, and locate facilities efficiently, especially new students.
problems.goal: Develop an intelligent campus navigation system that provides real-time directions, facility information, and accessibility routes.
problems.expectedOutcome: A mobile-friendly web application with interactive maps, search functionality, and voice-guided navigation for campus facilities.

problems.title: Sustainable Lab Waste Management
problems.problem: Science laboratories generate chemical and biological waste that requires proper disposal, but current tracking methods are manual and error-prone.
problems.goal: Create a digital waste tracking and management system that ensures compliance with environmental regulations.
problems.expectedOutcome: A comprehensive platform for logging, tracking, and scheduling proper disposal of laboratory waste with automated compliance reports.

problems.title: Student Budget Tracker
problems.problem: College students often struggle with financial management, leading to overspending and inability to save for important expenses.
problems.goal: Build an intuitive personal finance application tailored for student needs and spending patterns.
problems.expectedOutcome: A user-friendly budgeting app with expense categorization, savings goals, and smart spending insights designed for students.

problems.title: AI-Powered Study Assistant
problems.problem: Students spend excessive time organizing study materials and creating revision notes from various sources.
problems.goal: Develop an AI-powered tool that helps students organize, summarize, and create flashcards from their study materials.
problems.expectedOutcome: An intelligent study companion that can process documents, generate summaries, and create interactive study materials.

problems.title: Water Quality Monitoring Dashboard
problems.problem: Manual water quality testing is time-consuming, and data is often not accessible to stakeholders in real-time.
problems.goal: Create a dashboard that visualizes water quality parameters and alerts users to anomalies.
problems.expectedOutcome: An interactive dashboard displaying water quality metrics with trend analysis and automated alert systems.

problems.title: Local Business Marketplace
problems.problem: Small local businesses around the college lack digital presence and struggle to reach student customers.
problems.goal: Build a hyperlocal marketplace connecting campus students with nearby vendors and services.
problems.expectedOutcome: A marketplace platform featuring local businesses, student deals, and integrated ordering/booking systems.
